text: The HEK 293T cells, MPC-38 cell line (SUNNCELL, China), primary bone marrow-derived macrophages (BMDMs), and primary mouse acinar cells were cultured in DMEM (Gibco, USA) supplemented with 10% fetal bovine serum and 1% penicillin-streptomycin solution (Biological Industries, Israel). They were cultured at 37°C in a 5% CO2 atmosphere. For macrophages, the medium was supplemented with 20 ng/ml of M-CSF (ABclonal, China). The HEK 293T cells were obtained from Procell Co., LTD (CL-0005, Wuhan, China).
